name: bulbapedia
description: External Pokémon Red / Gen I knowledge: type matchups, move effects, map names, gym order, item locations. Use when the agent needs to look up facts to decide moves (e.g. battle type chart, where to go next).
implementation: Optional. Can be: (1) web search / scrape Bulbapedia, (2) local or cached JSON DB of type chart and key maps, (3) LLM training knowledge only (no tool call).
status: Stub. Not yet implemented in bug_catcher; agent currently relies on memory dataset and LLM knowledge. Add when battle or navigation decisions benefit from structured lookup.
suggested_usage: When in battle: look up type effectiveness (e.g. Water vs Rock). When lost: look up region/map names. Reply format could be a short summary injected into the prompt before the next action decision.
